nasb.text: Some from among the heads of fathers’ households gave to the work. The governor gave to the treasury 1,000 gold drachmas, 50 basins, 530 priests’ garments.

esv.text: Now some of the heads of fathers’ houses gave to the work. The governor gave to the treasury 1,000 darics of gold, 50 basins, 30 priests’ garments and 500 minas of silver.

cnv.text: 有些族長為了這工程而捐獻；省長捐給庫房金子八公斤、碗五十個和祭司的禮服五百三十件；

ccb.text: 有些族长为工程捐出财物。省长捐出八点五公斤金子、五十个碗和五百三十件祭司礼服。
